channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ohio State fans break into Ohio Stadium to celebrate 1st national title since 2014
item.description: Ohio State fans celebrated the Buckeyes' sixth national title by storming the field at Ohio Stadium in Columbus on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: In his hometown, Spurs' Victor Wembanyama dedicates a pair of new outdoor courts for kids to enjoy
item.description: LE CHESNAY, France (AP) — Victor Wembanyama stood on the center stripe of a new outdoor court in his hometown, his arms outstretched to their full 8-foot wingspan as he posed for a slew of photographers. He could not have seemed happier.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ohio State's Ryan Day earns vindication along with Buckeyes' first national championship since 2014
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Ryan Day deserved to feel vindication when he won a national championship less than two months after it seemed his Ohio State job was on the line. That relief only lasts so long.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Brittney Griner to test the market for the first time in career as WNBA free agency opens
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Brittney Griner is testing the free agent market for the first time in her career. The All-Star center is taking meetings starting Tuesday with multiple teams, according to her agent. WNBA executives were in Miami for the opening of Unrivaled to talk with Griner and other free agents.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ichiro is set to become Japan's first Hall of Famer. Here's who might join him in Cooperstown
item.description: Ichiro Suzuki could join Mariano Rivera as the only unanimous picks for baseball’s Hall of Fame and CC Sabathia, Billy Wagner and Carlos Beltrán also could be elected when results of the writers’ voting are announced.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Coco Gauff says she has more work to do after losing at the Australian Open. Djokovic beats Alcaraz
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff's retooled forehand and serve abandoned her in the worst way and at the worst time at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kirk Herbstreit, Ohio State football alum, breaks down during broadcast after Buckeyes win national title
item.description: After watching his alma mater win the college football national championship, ESPN's Kirk Herbstreit, who was on the call for the game, was in tears.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN airs Trump message during college football national title game, triggering social media meltdown
item.description: ESPN on Monday decided to air a message from President Trump at halftime of the college football national championship and on the day of his inauguration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 1 Auburn faces No. 6 Tennessee in loaded week for SEC in AP Top 25
item.description: The Southeastern Conference can make a strong argument as the best league in college basketball with eight ranked teams and five in the top 10. The bevy of AP Top 25 teams leads to ranked SEC teams playing each other pretty much every week.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: South Carolina gains a first-place vote as UCLA, Gamecocks, Notre Dame top women's AP Top 25
item.description: South Carolina has so far cruised through the difficult part of its conference schedule and remained No. 2 in The Associated Press women's basketball Top 25 on Monday, picking up a first-place vote to gain a bit of ground on top-ranked UCLA.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GBI agents spotted at CFP National Championship Game as part of buffed security following New Orleans tragedy
item.description: The College Football Playoff National Championship Game has the city of Atlanta beefing up security measures, including agents from the GBI getting boots on the ground.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Barkley runs for 78- and 62-yard TDs in the snow and Eagles top Rams 28-22 to head to NFC title game
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley blew through a hole and ran untouched in the wintry mix, the Eagles' 2,000-yard rusher smacking his helmet with his hand on his final snowy steps of a 78-yard touchdown run.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former MLB catcher, AL manager of the year for the White Sox dies at 83
item.description: Jeff Torborg, a former MLB catcher and manager of the Chicago White Sox, died this morning in Westfield, New Jersey, after a career that included a World Series championship and a Manager of the Year award.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Coco Gauff writes 'RIP TikTok USA' on a TV camera at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis star Coco Gauff mourned the loss of TikTok's app back home, writing on a TV camera lens “RIP TikTok USA” and drawing a broken heart right after winning a match at the Australian Open to reach the quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes hold off BYU in overtime, 73-72
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a career-high 26 points on 11-of-15 shooting and Hunter Erickson scored Utah's last six points on Saturday night to help the Runnin' Utes beat BYU 73-72 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Keller's four points leads Utah past St. Louis, 4-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller had a goal and three assists to help the Utah Hockey Club defeat the St. Louis Blues 4-2 at Delta Center on Saturday. Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists, and Connor Ingram made 22 saves for Utah (19-19-7), which had lost three straight.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bertuzzi, Jones help Blackhawks beat slumping Golden Knights 5-3
item.description: Tyler Bertuzzi scored two power-play goals and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the slumping Vegas Golden Knights 5-3 on Saturday night to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sammy Sosa gets warm reception for his reconciliation with the Chicago Cubs
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa jogged onto the stage, carrying an American flag. The crowd cheered wildly. It was just like old times — only Sosa was dressed in a suit, and the scene occurred in a downtown hotel ballroom instead of Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
